scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:server && npm run typecheck:client
scripts.test:fast: npm run test:fast --workspace @wonderlands/server && npm run test:fast --workspace @wonderlands/client && npm run test:mcp
scripts.test:extended: npm run test:extended --workspace @wonderlands/server && npm run test:extended --workspace @wonderlands/client
scripts.test:mcp: npm test --prefix mcp/files-mcp && npm test --prefix mcp/shared
scripts.test:mcp:typecheck: npm run typecheck --prefix mcp/files-mcp && npm run typecheck --prefix mcp/shared
scripts.test:release: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test:fast && npm run test:extended && npm run test:mcp:typecheck && npm run build --workspace @wonderlands/client
scripts.lint: npm run lint:server && npm run lint:client
